about.title: What is e-Balami?
about.description: e-Balami is a trusted Somali brand, established to combat fraud and provide reliable, accessible services. The name "e-Balami" means "Book for me."
about.missionDescription: Our mission is to build a bridge of trust that connects customers and service providers.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We are ready to help you. Please contact us by tapping the numbers and addresses below.
